name: Disable CloudTrail Write Event Logging via Event Selectors
description: Simulates an attacker using PutEventSelectors to restrict CloudTrail logging to read-only events only, effectively silencing write-event logging — the events most relevant for detecting attacks.
prerequisites: CloudTrail trail (stratus-red-team-ct-selectors-trail) with associated S3 bucket
detection_signal: cloudtrail:PutEventSelectors with IncludeManagementEvents=false or ReadWriteType=ReadOnly — silences write activity from CloudTrail
